posts.text:
Lately I've been enjoying how Claude Code can create purpose-built SwiftBar plugins with ease. Yesterday I made one for my Jobinator dashboard, this evening I made one on a whim to help handle NFS mount status. 

Being able to identify a specific point of friction in my day-to-day workflow and then solving it within a matter of minutes with purpose-built software is wild.

Wake up babe, new thcoin just dropped

https://thick-coins.net/thent.html
